title: pseudosorghum zollingeri
intro: Pseudosorghum zollingeri, also known as Zollinger's grass or Chinese broomcorn, is a type of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The health benefits of pseudosorghum zollingeri include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in the treatment of certain gastrointestinal disorders. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea form or as a dried powder, and is said to have a sweet, slightly bitter taste.
